tEn: Semantic Image Synthesis with Spatially-Adaptive Normalization
tZh: 语义图像合成与空间自适应归一化
sEn: We propose spatially-adaptive normalization for photorealistic image synthesis from semantic layouts, outperforming previous methods in visual fidelity and layout alignment.
sZh: 我们提出空间自适应归一化，用于从语义布局合成逼真图像，在视觉保真度和布局对齐方面优于现有方法。
absEn: We propose spatially-adaptive normalization, a simple but effective layer for synthesizing photorealistic images given an input semantic layout. Previous methods directly feed the semantic layout as input to the deep network, which is then processed through stacks of convolution, normalization, and nonlinearity layers. We show that this is suboptimal as the normalization layers tend to ``wash away'' semantic information. To address the issue, we propose using the input layout for modulating the activations in normalization layers through a spatially-adaptive, learned transformation. Experiments on several challenging datasets demonstrate the advantage of the proposed method over existing approaches, regarding both visual fidelity and alignment with input layouts. Finally, our model allows user control over both semantic and style. Code is available at https://github.com/NVlabs/SPADE .
absZh: 我们提出了空间自适应归一化，这是一种简单但有效的层，用于根据输入的语义布局合成逼真的图像。先前的方法直接将语义布局作为深度网络的输入，然后通过卷积、归一化和非线性层的堆叠进行处理。我们证明这是次优的，因为归一化层往往会“冲走”语义信息。为了解决这个问题，我们提出使用输入布局通过空间自适应的学习变换来调制归一化层中的激活。在几个具有挑战性的数据集上的实验表明，所提出的方法在视觉保真度和与输入布局的对齐方面均优于现有方法。最后，我们的模型允许用户控制语义和风格。代码可在 https://github.com/NVlabs/SPADE 获取。

contrib.en: Proposes spatially-adaptive normalization (SPADE) to preserve semantic information in normalization layers.
contrib.zh: 提出空间自适应归一化（SPADE），在归一化层中保留语义信息。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art results on COCO-Stuff, ADE20K, and Cityscapes datasets.
contrib.zh: 在COCO-Stuff、ADE20K和Cityscapes数据集上取得最优结果。

contrib.en: Enables multi-modal synthesis by using random noise as generator input.
contrib.zh: 通过使用随机噪声作为生成器输入，实现多模态合成。

contrib.en: Supports style-guided image synthesis via an image encoder.
contrib.zh: 通过图像编码器支持风格引导的图像合成。

contrib.en: Simplifies generator architecture by removing encoder, reducing parameters.
contrib.zh: 简化生成器架构，移除编码器，减少参数量。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that SPADE outperforms feature concatenation for semantic conditioning.
contrib.zh: 证明SPADE在语义条件化上优于特征拼接。

limits.en: Requires paired segmentation masks and images for training.
limits.zh: 需要配对的语义分割掩码和图像进行训练。

limits.en: Performance depends on quality of input segmentation masks.
limits.zh: 性能依赖于输入分割掩码的质量。

limits.en: Multi-modal synthesis limited by diversity of training data.
limits.zh: 多模态合成受限于训练数据的多样性。

limits.en: Computationally expensive due to multi-scale discriminators and spectral normalization.
limits.zh: 由于多尺度判别器和谱归一化，计算成本高。

limits.en: Style transfer may not generalize to unseen styles outside training distribution.
limits.zh: 风格迁移可能无法泛化到训练分布之外的未见风格。

items.en: We propose spatially-adaptive normalization, a simple but effective layer for synthesizing photorealistic images given an input semantic layout. Previous methods directly feed the semantic layout as input to the deep network, which is then processed through stacks of convolution, normalization, and nonlinearity layers. We show that this is suboptimal as the normalization layers tend to “wash away” semantic information. To address the issue, we propose using the input layout for modulating the activations in normalization layers through a spatially-adaptive, learned transformation. Experiments on several challenging datasets demonstrate the advantage of the proposed method over existing approaches, regarding both visual fidelity and alignment with input layouts. Finally, our model allows user control over both semantic and style. Code is available at https://github.com/NVlabs/SPADE.
items.zh: 我们提出空间自适应归一化，这是一种简单但有效的层，用于根据输入的语义布局合成逼真的图像。先前的方法直接将语义布局作为深度网络的输入，然后通过卷积、归一化和非线性层的堆叠进行处理。我们表明这是次优的，因为归一化层倾向于“冲刷掉”语义信息。为了解决这个问题，我们提出使用输入布局通过空间自适应的学习变换来调制归一化层中的激活。在几个具有挑战性的数据集上的实验证明了所提方法在视觉保真度和与输入布局的对齐方面优于现有方法。最后，我们的模型允许用户同时控制语义和风格。代码可在 https://github.com/NVlabs/SPADE 获取。

items.en: Conditional image synthesis refers to the task of generating photorealistic images conditioning on certain input data. Seminal work computes the output image by stitching pieces from a single image (e.g., Image Analogies [16]) or using an image collection [23, 14, 30, 7, 35]. Recent methods directly learn the mapping using neural networks [22, 6, 48, 47, 55, 56, 54, 3]. The latter methods are faster and require no external database of images.
items.zh: 条件图像合成是指根据某些输入数据生成逼真图像的任务。开创性工作通过拼接单张图像（例如，Image Analogies [16]）或使用图像集合 [23, 14, 30, 7, 35] 中的片段来计算输出图像。最近的方法直接使用神经网络学习映射 [22, 6, 48, 47, 55, 56, 54, 3]。后一种方法速度更快，且不需要外部图像数据库。

items.en: We are interested in a specific form of conditional image synthesis, which is converting a semantic segmentation mask to a photorealistic image. This form has a wide range of applications such as content generation and image editing [22, 6, 48]. We refer to this form as semantic image synthesis. In this paper, we show that the conventional network architecture [22, 48], which is built by stacking convolutional, normalization, and nonlinearity layers, is at best suboptimal because their normalization layers tend to “wash away” information contained in the input semantic masks. To address the issue, we propose spatially-adaptive normalization, a conditional normalization layer that modulates the activations using input semantic layouts through a spatially-adaptive, learned transformation and can effectively propagate the semantic information throughout the network.
items.zh: 我们关注条件图像合成的一种特定形式，即将语义分割掩码转换为逼真图像。这种形式具有广泛的应用，例如内容生成和图像编辑 [22, 6, 48]。我们将这种形式称为语义图像合成。在本文中，我们表明，通过堆叠卷积、归一化和非线性层构建的传统网络架构 [22, 48] 充其量是次优的，因为它们的归一化层倾向于“冲刷掉”输入语义掩码中包含的信息。为了解决这个问题，我们提出空间自适应归一化，这是一种条件归一化层，通过空间自适应的学习变换使用输入语义布局调制激活，并能有效地在整个网络中传播语义信息。

items.en: We conduct experiments on several challenging datasets including the COCO-Stuff [4, 32], the ADE20K [58], and the Cityscapes [9]. We show that with the help of our spatially-adaptive normalization layer, a compact network can synthesize significantly better results compared to several state-of-the-art methods. Additionally, an extensive ablation study demonstrates the effectiveness of the proposed normalization layer against several variants for the semantic image synthesis task. Finally, our method supports multi-modal and style-guided image synthesis, enabling controllable, diverse outputs, as shown in Figure 1. Also, please see our SIGGRAPH 2019 Real-Time Live demo and try our online demo by yourself.
items.zh: 我们在几个具有挑战性的数据集上进行了实验，包括 COCO-Stuff [4, 32]、ADE20K [58] 和 Cityscapes [9]。我们表明，借助我们的空间自适应归一化层，一个紧凑的网络可以合成比几种最先进方法显著更好的结果。此外，广泛的消融研究证明了所提归一化层在语义图像合成任务中相对于几种变体的有效性。最后，我们的方法支持多模态和风格引导的图像合成，实现可控、多样化的输出，如图 1 所示。另请观看我们的 SIGGRAPH 2019 实时演示，并亲自尝试我们的在线演示。

items.en: Deep generative models can learn to synthesize images. Recent methods include generative adversarial networks (GANs) [13] and variational autoencoder (VAE) [28]. Our work is built on GANs but aims for the conditional image synthesis task. The GANs consist of a generator and a discriminator where the goal of the generator is to produce realistic images so that the discriminator cannot tell the synthesized images apart from the real ones.
items.zh: 深度生成模型可以学习合成图像。最近的方法包括生成对抗网络（GAN）[13] 和变分自编码器（VAE）[28]。我们的工作基于 GAN，但针对条件图像合成任务。GAN 由生成器和判别器组成，生成器的目标是生成逼真的图像，使得判别器无法区分合成图像与真实图像。

items.en: Conditional image synthesis exists in many forms that differ in the type of input data. For example, class-conditional models [41, 39, 36, 3, 37] learn to synthesize images given category labels. Researchers have explored various models for generating images based on text [44, 55, 52, 18]. Another widely-used form is image-to-image translation based on a type of conditional GANs [24, 22, 59, 33, 60, 20, 57, 25], where both input and output are images. Compared to earlier non-parametric methods [16, 23, 7], learning-based methods typically run faster during test time and produce more realistic results. In this work, we focus on converting segmentation masks to photorealistic images. We assume the training dataset contains registered segmentation masks and images. With the proposed spatially-adaptive normalization, our compact network achieves better results compared to leading methods.
items.zh: 条件图像合成存在多种形式，其区别在于输入数据的类型。例如，类条件模型 [41, 39, 36, 3, 37] 学习根据类别标签合成图像。研究人员探索了基于文本生成图像的各种模型 [44, 55, 52, 18]。另一种广泛使用的形式是基于条件 GAN [24, 22, 59, 33, 60, 20, 57, 25] 的图像到图像转换，其中输入和输出都是图像。与早期的非参数方法 [16, 23, 7] 相比，基于学习的方法在测试时通常运行更快，并产生更逼真的结果。在这项工作中，我们专注于将分割掩码转换为逼真图像。我们假设训练数据集包含配准的分割掩码和图像。通过提出的空间自适应归一化，我们的紧凑网络比领先方法取得了更好的结果。

items.en: Unconditional normalization layers have been an important component in modern deep networks and can be found in various classifiers, including the Local Response Normalization in the AlexNet [29] and the Batch Normalization (BatchNorm) in the Inception-v2 network [21]. Other popular normalization layers include the Instance Normalization (InstanceNorm) [46], the Layer Normalization [2], the Group Normalization [50], and the Weight Normalization [45]. We label these normalization layers as unconditional as they do not depend on external data in contrast to the conditional normalization layers discussed below.
items.zh: 无条件归一化层是现代深度网络中的重要组成部分，可以在各种分类器中找到，包括 AlexNet [29] 中的局部响应归一化和 Inception-v2 网络 [21] 中的批量归一化（BatchNorm）。其他流行的归一化层包括实例归一化（InstanceNorm）[46]、层归一化 [2]、组归一化 [50] 和权重归一化 [45]。我们将这些归一化层标记为无条件，因为它们不依赖于外部数据，与下面讨论的条件归一化层相反。

items.en: Conditional normalization layers include the Conditional Batch Normalization (Conditional BatchNorm) [11] and Adaptive Instance Normalization (AdaIN) [19]. Both were first used in the style transfer task and later adopted in various vision tasks [10, 42, 20, 39, 54, 36, 49, 8, 3, 26]. Different from the earlier normalization techniques, conditional normalization layers require external data and generally operate as follows. First, layer activations are normalized to zero mean and unit deviation. Then the normalized activations are denormalized by modulating the activation using a learned affine transformation whose parameters are inferred from external data. For style transfer tasks [11, 19], the affine parameters are used to control the global style of the output, and hence are uniform across spatial coordinates. In contrast, our proposed normalization layer applies a spatially-varying affine transformation, making it suitable for image synthesis from semantic masks. Wang et al. proposed a closely related method for image super-resolution [49]. Both methods are built on spatially-adaptive modulation layers that condition on semantic inputs. While they aim to incorporate semantic information into super-resolution, our goal is to design a generator for style and semantics disentanglement. We focus on providing the semantic information in the context of modulating normalized activations. We use semantic maps in different scales, which enables coarse-to-fine generation. The reader is encouraged to review their work for more details.
items.zh: 条件归一化层包括条件批量归一化（Conditional BatchNorm）[11] 和自适应实例归一化（AdaIN）[19]。两者最初用于风格迁移任务，后来被用于各种视觉任务 [10, 42, 20, 39, 54, 36, 49, 8, 3, 26]。与早期的归一化技术不同，条件归一化层需要外部数据，并且通常按如下方式操作。首先，层激活被归一化为零均值和单位偏差。然后，通过使用从外部数据推断参数的学习仿射变换调制激活来去归一化归一化后的激活。对于风格迁移任务 [11, 19]，仿射参数用于控制输出的全局风格，因此在空间坐标上是均匀的。相比之下，我们提出的归一化层应用空间变化的仿射变换，使其适用于从语义掩码合成图像。Wang 等人提出了一种用于图像超分辨率的密切相关方法 [49]。两种方法都建立在条件于语义输入的空间自适应调制层上。虽然他们旨在将语义信息融入超分辨率，但我们的目标是设计一个用于风格和语义解耦的生成器。我们专注于在调制归一化激活的上下文中提供语义信息。我们在不同尺度上使用语义图，从而实现从粗到细的生成。鼓励读者查阅他们的工作以获取更多细节。

items.en: Let 𝐦∈𝕃H×W𝐦superscript𝕃𝐻𝑊\mathbf{m}\in\mathbb{L}^{H\times W} be a semantic segmentation mask where 𝕃𝕃\mathbb{L} is a set of integers denoting the semantic labels, and H𝐻H and W𝑊W are the image height and width. Each entry in 𝐦𝐦\mathbf{m} denotes the semantic label of a pixel. We aim to learn a mapping function that can convert an input segmentation mask 𝐦𝐦\mathbf{m} to a photorealistic image.
items.zh: 设 𝐦∈𝕃^{H×W} 为语义分割掩码，其中 𝕃 是表示语义标签的整数集合，H 和 W 是图像高度和宽度。𝐦 中的每个条目表示像素的语义标签。我们旨在学习一个映射函数，将输入分割掩码 𝐦 转换为逼真图像。

items.capEn: Figure 2: In the SPADE, the mask is first projected onto an embedding space and then convolved to produce the modulation parameters 𝜸𝜸\bm{\gamma} and 𝜷𝜷\bm{\beta}. Unlike prior conditional normalization methods, 𝜸𝜸\bm{\gamma} and 𝜷𝜷\bm{\beta} are not vectors, but tensors with spatial dimensions. The produced 𝜸𝜸\bm{\gamma} and 𝜷𝜷\bm{\beta} are multiplied and added to the normalized activation element-wise.
items.capZh: 图 2：在 SPADE 中，掩码首先被投影到嵌入空间，然后进行卷积以产生调制参数 𝜸 和 𝜷。与先前的条件归一化方法不同，𝜸 和 𝜷 不是向量，而是具有空间维度的张量。产生的 𝜸 和 𝜷 与归一化激活逐元素相乘和相加。

items.en: Spatially-adaptive denormalization. Let 𝐡isuperscript𝐡𝑖\mathbf{h}^{i} denote the activations of the i𝑖i-th layer of a deep convolutional network for a batch of N𝑁N samples. Let Cisuperscript𝐶𝑖C^{i} be the number of channels in the layer. Let Hisuperscript𝐻𝑖H^{i} and Wisuperscript𝑊𝑖W^{i} be the height and width of the activation map in the layer. We propose a new conditional normalization method called the SPatially-Adaptive (DE)normalization111Conditional normalization [11, 19] uses external data to denormalize the normalized activations; i.e., the denormalization part is conditional. (SPADE). Similar to the Batch Normalization [21], the activation is normalized in the channel-wise manner and then modulated with learned scale and bias. Figure 2 illustrates the SPADE design. The activation value at site (n∈N,c∈Ci,y∈Hi,x∈Wi)formulae-sequence𝑛𝑁formulae-sequence𝑐superscript𝐶𝑖formulae-sequence𝑦superscript𝐻𝑖𝑥superscript𝑊𝑖(n\in N,c\in C^{i},y\in H^{i},x\in W^{i}) is
items.zh: 空间自适应去归一化。设 𝐡^i 表示深度卷积网络第 i 层对于 N 个样本批次的激活。设 C^i 为该层的通道数。设 H^i 和 W^i 为该层激活图的高度和宽度。我们提出一种新的条件归一化方法，称为空间自适应（去）归一化（SPADE）。与批量归一化 [21] 类似，激活按通道方式归一化，然后使用学习到的尺度和偏置进行调制。图 2 说明了 SPADE 的设计。位置 (n∈N, c∈C^i, y∈H^i, x∈W^i) 处的激活值为

items.en: where hn,c,y,xisubscriptsuperscriptℎ𝑖𝑛𝑐𝑦𝑥h^{i}_{n,c,y,x} is the activation at the site before normalization and μcisubscriptsuperscript𝜇𝑖𝑐\mu^{i}_{c} and σcisubscriptsuperscript𝜎𝑖𝑐\sigma^{i}_{c} are the mean and standard deviation of the activations in channel c𝑐c:
items.zh: 其中 h^i_{n,c,y,x} 是归一化前该位置的激活，μ^i_c 和 σ^i_c 是通道 c 中激活的均值和标准差：

items.en: The variables γc,y,xi​(𝐦)subscriptsuperscript𝛾𝑖𝑐𝑦𝑥𝐦\gamma^{i}_{c,y,x}(\mathbf{m}) and βc,y,xi​(𝐦)subscriptsuperscript𝛽𝑖𝑐𝑦𝑥𝐦\beta^{i}_{c,y,x}(\mathbf{m}) in (1) are the learned modulation parameters of the normalization layer. In contrast to the BatchNorm [21], they depend on the input segmentation mask and vary with respect to the location (y,x)𝑦𝑥(y,x). We use the symbol γc,y,xisubscriptsuperscript𝛾𝑖𝑐𝑦𝑥\gamma^{i}_{c,y,x} and βc,y,xisubscriptsuperscript𝛽𝑖𝑐𝑦𝑥\beta^{i}_{c,y,x} to denote the functions that convert 𝐦𝐦\mathbf{m} to the scaling and bias values at the site (c,y,x)𝑐𝑦𝑥(c,y,x) in the i𝑖i-th activation map. We implement the functions γc,y,xisubscriptsuperscript𝛾𝑖𝑐𝑦𝑥\gamma^{i}_{c,y,x} and βc,y,xisubscriptsuperscript𝛽𝑖𝑐𝑦𝑥\beta^{i}_{c,y,x} using a simple two-layer convolutional network, whose design is in the appendix.
items.zh: 公式 (1) 中的变量 γ^i_{c,y,x}(𝐦) 和 β^i_{c,y,x}(𝐦) 是归一化层的学习调制参数。与 BatchNorm [21] 不同，它们依赖于输入分割掩码，并随位置 (y,x) 变化。我们使用符号 γ^i_{c,y,x} 和 β^i_{c,y,x} 表示将 𝐦 转换为第 i 个激活图中位置 (c,y,x) 处的缩放和偏置值的函数。我们使用简单的两层卷积网络实现函数 γ^i_{c,y,x} 和 β^i_{c,y,x}，其设计见附录。

items.en: In fact, SPADE is related to, and is a generalization of several existing normalization layers. First, replacing the segmentation mask 𝐦𝐦\mathbf{m} with the image class label and making the modulation parameters spatially-invariant (i.e., γc,y1,x1i≡γc,y2,x2isubscriptsuperscript𝛾𝑖𝑐subscript𝑦1subscript𝑥1subscriptsuperscript𝛾𝑖𝑐subscript𝑦2subscript𝑥2\gamma^{i}_{c,y_{1},x_{1}}\equiv\gamma^{i}_{c,y_{2},x_{2}} and βc,y1,x1i≡βc,y2,x2isubscriptsuperscript𝛽𝑖𝑐subscript𝑦1subscript𝑥1subscriptsuperscript𝛽𝑖𝑐subscript𝑦2subscript𝑥2\beta^{i}_{c,y_{1},x_{1}}\equiv\beta^{i}_{c,y_{2},x_{2}} for any y1,y2∈{1,2,…,Hi}subscript𝑦1subscript𝑦212…superscript𝐻𝑖y_{1},y_{2}\in\{1,2,...,H^{i}\} and x1,x2∈{1,2,…,Wi}subscript𝑥1subscript𝑥212…superscript𝑊𝑖x_{1},x_{2}\in\{1,2,...,W^{i}\}), we arrive at the form of the Conditional BatchNorm [11]. Indeed, for any spatially-invariant conditional data, our method reduces to the Conditional BatchNorm. Similarly, we can arrive at the AdaIN [19] by replacing 𝐦𝐦\mathbf{m} with a real image, making the modulation parameters spatially-invariant, and setting N=1𝑁1N=1. As the modulation parameters are adaptive to the input segmentation mask, the proposed SPADE is better suited for semantic image synthesis.
items.zh: 实际上，SPADE 与几种现有的归一化层相关，并且是它们的推广。首先，将分割掩码 𝐦 替换为图像类标签，并使调制参数空间不变（即，对于任意 y1,y2∈{1,2,…,H^i} 和 x1,x2∈{1,2,…,W^i}，有 γ^i_{c,y1,x1}≡γ^i_{c,y2,x2} 和 β^i_{c,y1,x1}≡β^i_{c,y2,x2}），我们就得到了 Conditional BatchNorm [11] 的形式。实际上，对于任何空间不变的条件数据，我们的方法退化为 Conditional BatchNorm。类似地，通过将 𝐦 替换为真实图像，使调制参数空间不变，并设置 N=1，我们可以得到 AdaIN [19]。由于调制参数自适应于输入分割掩码，所提出的 SPADE 更适合语义图像合成。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Comparing results given uniform segmentation maps: while the SPADE generator produces plausible textures, the pix2pixHD generator [48] produces two identical outputs due to the loss of the semantic information after the normalization layer.
items.capZh: 图 3：给定均匀分割图的结果比较：SPADE 生成器产生合理的纹理，而 pix2pixHD 生成器 [48] 由于归一化层后语义信息的丢失而产生两个相同的输出。

items.en: SPADE generator. With the SPADE, there is no need to feed the segmentation map to the first layer of the generator, since the learned modulation parameters have encoded enough information about the label layout. Therefore, we discard encoder part of the generator, which is commonly used in recent architectures [48, 22]. This simplification results in a more lightweight network. Furthermore, similarly to existing class-conditional generators [39, 54, 36], the new generator can take a random vector as input, enabling a simple and natural way for multi-modal synthesis [60, 20].
items.zh: SPADE 生成器。使用 SPADE，无需将分割图馈送到生成器的第一层，因为学习到的调制参数已经编码了关于标签布局的足够信息。因此，我们丢弃了生成器的编码器部分，这在最近的架构 [48, 22] 中很常见。这种简化导致网络更轻量。此外，与现有的类条件生成器 [39, 54, 36] 类似，新生成器可以接受随机向量作为输入，从而为多模态合成提供简单自然的方式 [60, 20]。

items.en: We train the generator with the same multi-scale discriminator and loss function used in pix2pixHD [48] except that we replace the least squared loss term [34] with the hinge loss term [31, 38, 54]. We test several ResNet-based discriminators used in recent unconditional GANs [1, 36, 39] but observe similar results at the cost of a higher GPU memory requirement. Adding the SPADE to the discriminator also yields a similar performance. For the loss function, we observe that removing any loss term in the pix2pixHD loss function lead to degraded generation results.
items.zh: 我们使用与 pix2pixHD [48] 相同的多尺度判别器和损失函数训练生成器，只是将最小二乘损失项 [34] 替换为铰链损失项 [31, 38, 54]。我们测试了最近无条件 GAN [1, 36, 39] 中使用的几种基于 ResNet 的判别器，但观察到类似的结果，代价是更高的 GPU 内存需求。将 SPADE 添加到判别器也产生了类似的性能。对于损失函数，我们观察到移除 pix2pixHD 损失函数中的任何损失项都会导致生成结果退化。

items.capEn: Figure 4: In the SPADE generator, each normalization layer uses the segmentation mask to modulate the layer activations. (left) Structure of one residual block with the SPADE. (right) The generator contains a series of the SPADE residual blocks with upsampling layers. Our architecture achieves better performance with a smaller number of parameters by removing the downsampling layers of leading image-to-image translation networks such as the pix2pixHD model [48].
items.capZh: 图 4：在 SPADE 生成器中，每个归一化层使用分割掩码来调制层激活。（左）带有 SPADE 的一个残差块的结构。（右）生成器包含一系列带有上采样层的 SPADE 残差块。我们的架构通过移除领先的图像到图像转换网络（如 pix2pixHD 模型 [48]）的下采样层，以更少的参数实现了更好的性能。

items.en: Why does the SPADE work better? A short answer is that it can better preserve semantic information against common normalization layers. Specifically, while normalization layers such as the InstanceNorm [46] are essential pieces in almost all the state-of-the-art conditional image synthesis models [48], they tend to wash away semantic information when applied to uniform or flat segmentation masks.
items.zh: 为什么 SPADE 效果更好？简短的回答是，它能更好地保留语义信息，抵抗常见的归一化层。具体来说，虽然归一化层如 InstanceNorm [46] 几乎是所有最先进的条件图像合成模型 [48] 中必不可少的组成部分，但当应用于均匀或平坦的分割掩码时，它们往往会冲刷掉语义信息。

items.en: Let us consider a simple module that first applies convolution to a segmentation mask and then normalization. Furthermore, let us assume that a segmentation mask with a single label is given as input to the module (e.g., all the pixels have the same label such as sky or grass). Under this setting, the convolution outputs are again uniform, with different labels having different uniform values. Now, after we apply InstanceNorm to the output, the normalized activation will become all zeros no matter what the input semantic label is given. Therefore, semantic information is totally lost. This limitation applies to a wide range of generator architectures, including pix2pixHD and its variant that concatenates the semantic mask at all intermediate layers, as long as a network applies convolution and then normalization to the semantic mask. In Figure 3, we empirically show this is precisely the case for pix2pixHD. Because a segmentation mask consists of a few uniform regions in general, the issue of information loss emerges when applying normalization.
items.zh: 让我们考虑一个简单的模块，它首先对分割掩码应用卷积，然后进行归一化。此外，假设输入给模块的是一个单一标签的分割掩码（例如，所有像素具有相同的标签，如天空或草地）。在这种情况下，卷积输出也是均匀的，不同标签具有不同的均匀值。现在，当我们对输出应用 InstanceNorm 后，无论输入语义标签是什么，归一化后的激活都将变为全零。因此，语义信息完全丢失。这种限制适用于广泛的生成器架构，包括 pix2pixHD 及其变体（在所有中间层连接语义掩码），只要网络对语义掩码应用卷积然后归一化。在图 3 中，我们凭经验证明 pix2pixHD 正是这种情况。由于分割掩码通常由几个均匀区域组成，因此应用归一化时会出现信息丢失的问题。

items.en: In contrast, the segmentation mask in the SPADE Generator is fed through spatially adaptive modulation without normalization. Only activations from the previous layer are normalized. Hence, the SPADE generator can better preserve semantic information. It enjoys the benefit of normalization without losing the semantic input information.
items.zh: 相比之下，SPADE生成器中的分割掩码通过空间自适应调制传递，无需归一化。仅对前一层的激活进行归一化。因此，SPADE生成器能更好地保留语义信息，既享受归一化的好处，又不丢失语义输入信息。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Visual comparison of semantic image synthesis results on the COCO-Stuff dataset. Our method successfully synthesizes realistic details from semantic labels.
items.capZh: 图5：在COCO-Stuff数据集上的语义图像合成结果视觉比较。我们的方法成功地从语义标签中合成逼真的细节。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Visual comparison of semantic image synthesis results on the ADE20K outdoor and Cityscapes datasets. Our method produces realistic images while respecting the spatial semantic layout at the same time.
items.capZh: 图6：在ADE20K室外和Cityscapes数据集上的语义图像合成结果视觉比较。我们的方法生成逼真的图像，同时尊重空间语义布局。

items.en: Multi-modal synthesis. By using a random vector as the input of the generator, our architecture provides a simple way for multi-modal synthesis [60, 20]. Namely, one can attach an encoder that processes a real image into a random vector, which will be then fed to the generator. The encoder and generator form a VAE [28], in which the encoder tries to capture the style of the image, while the generator combines the encoded style and the segmentation mask information via the SPADEs to reconstruct the original image. The encoder also serves as a style guidance network at test time to capture the style of target images, as used in Figure 1. For training, we add a KL-Divergence loss term [28].
items.zh: 多模态合成。通过使用随机向量作为生成器的输入，我们的架构为多模态合成提供了一种简单的方法[60, 20]。即，可以附加一个编码器，将真实图像处理成随机向量，然后输入生成器。编码器和生成器构成一个VAE [28]，其中编码器试图捕捉图像的风格，而生成器通过SPADE将编码的风格与分割掩码信息结合，重建原始图像。编码器在测试时还充当风格引导网络，捕捉目标图像的风格，如图1所示。训练时，我们添加了KL散度损失项[28]。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Semantic image synthesis results on the Flickr Landscapes dataset. The images were generated from semantic layout of photographs on the Flickr website.
items.capZh: 图7：在Flickr Landscapes数据集上的语义图像合成结果。图像是根据Flickr网站上照片的语义布局生成的。

items.en: Implementation details. We apply the Spectral Norm [38] to all the layers in both generator and discriminator. The learning rates for the generator and discriminator are 0.00010.00010.0001 and 0.00040.00040.0004, respectively [17]. We use the ADAM solver [27] with β1=0subscript𝛽10\beta_{1}=0 and β2=0.999subscript𝛽20.999\beta_{2}=0.999. All the experiments are conducted on an NVIDIA DGX1 with 8 32GB V100 GPUs. We use synchronized BatchNorm, i.e., these statistics are collected from all the GPUs.
items.zh: 实现细节。我们对生成器和判别器的所有层应用谱归一化[38]。生成器和判别器的学习率分别为0.0001和0.0004 [17]。我们使用ADAM求解器[27]，β1=0，β2=0.999。所有实验均在配备8块32GB V100 GPU的NVIDIA DGX1上进行。我们使用同步批归一化，即这些统计信息从所有GPU收集。

items.en: Datasets. We conduct experiments on several datasets.
items.zh: 数据集。我们在多个数据集上进行实验。

items.en: COCO-Stuff [4] is derived from the COCO dataset [32]. It has 118,000118000118,000 training images and 5,00050005,000 validation images captured from diverse scenes. It has 182182182 semantic classes. Due to its vast diversity, existing image synthesis models perform poorly on this dataset.
items.zh: COCO-Stuff [4]源自COCO数据集[32]。它有118,000张训练图像和5,000张验证图像，来自不同场景。它有182个语义类别。由于其巨大的多样性，现有的图像合成模型在该数据集上表现不佳。

items.en: ADE20K [58] consists of 20,2102021020,210 training and 2,00020002,000 validation images. Similarly to the COCO, the dataset contains challenging scenes with 150 semantic classes.
items.zh: ADE20K [58]包含20,210张训练图像和2,000张验证图像。与COCO类似，该数据集包含具有挑战性的场景，有150个语义类别。

items.en: ADE20K-outdoor is a subset of the ADE20K dataset that only contains outdoor scenes, used in Qi et al. [43].
items.zh: ADE20K-outdoor是ADE20K数据集的一个子集，仅包含室外场景，由Qi等人[43]使用。

items.en: Cityscapes dataset [9] contains street scene images in German cities. The training and validation set sizes are 3,00030003,000 and 500500500, respectively. Recent work has achieved photorealistic semantic image synthesis results [47, 43] on the Cityscapes dataset.
items.zh: Cityscapes数据集[9]包含德国城市的街景图像。训练集和验证集的大小分别为3,000和500。最近的工作在Cityscapes数据集上实现了照片级逼真的语义图像合成结果[47, 43]。

items.en: Flickr Landscapes. We collect 41,0004100041,000 photos from Flickr and use 1,00010001,000 samples for the validation set. To avoid expensive manual annotation, we use a well-trained DeepLabV2 [5] to compute input segmentation masks.
items.zh: Flickr Landscapes。我们从Flickr收集了41,000张照片，并使用1,000个样本作为验证集。为避免昂贵的手动标注，我们使用训练良好的DeepLabV2 [5]计算输入分割掩码。

items.en: We train the competing semantic image synthesis methods on the same training set and report their results on the same validation set for each dataset.
items.zh: 我们在相同的训练集上训练竞争的语义图像合成方法，并在每个数据集的相同验证集上报告其结果。

items.en: Performance metrics. We adopt the evaluation protocol from previous work [6, 48]. Specifically, we run a semantic segmentation model on the synthesized images and compare how well the predicted segmentation mask matches the ground truth input. Intuitively, if the output images are realistic, a well-trained semantic segmentation model should be able to predict the ground truth label. For measuring the segmentation accuracy, we use both the mean Intersection-over-Union (mIoU) and the pixel accuracy (accu). We use the state-of-the-art segmentation networks for each dataset: DeepLabV2 [5, 40] for COCO-Stuff, UperNet101 [51] for ADE20K, and DRN-D-105 [53] for Cityscapes. In addition to the mIoU and the accu segmentation performance metrics, we use the Fréchet Inception Distance (FID) [17] to measure the distance between the distribution of synthesized results and the distribution of real images.
items.zh: 性能指标。我们采用先前工作的评估协议[6, 48]。具体来说，我们在合成图像上运行语义分割模型，并比较预测的分割掩码与真实输入的匹配程度。直观地说，如果输出图像是逼真的，训练良好的语义分割模型应该能够预测真实标签。为了衡量分割精度，我们使用平均交并比（mIoU）和像素精度（accu）。我们为每个数据集使用最先进的分割网络：COCO-Stuff使用DeepLabV2 [5, 40]，ADE20K使用UperNet101 [51]，Cityscapes使用DRN-D-105 [53]。除了mIoU和accu分割性能指标外，我们还使用Fréchet Inception距离（FID）[17]来衡量合成结果分布与真实图像分布之间的距离。

items.en: Baselines. We compare our method with 3 leading semantic image synthesis models: the pix2pixHD model [48], the cascaded refinement network (CRN) [6], and the semi-parametric image synthesis method (SIMS) [43]. The pix2pixHD is the current state-of-the-art GAN-based conditional image synthesis framework. The CRN uses a deep network that repeatedly refines the output from low to high resolution, while the SIMS takes a semi-parametric approach that composites real segments from a training set and refines the boundaries. Both the CRN and SIMS are mainly trained using image reconstruction loss. For a fair comparison, we train the CRN and pix2pixHD models using the implementations provided by the authors. As image synthesis using the SIMS requires many queries to the training dataset, it is computationally prohibitive for a large dataset such as the COCO-stuff and the full ADE20K. Therefore, we use the results provided by the authors when available.
items.zh: 基线方法。我们将我们的方法与3个领先的语义图像合成模型进行比较：pix2pixHD模型[48]、级联细化网络（CRN）[6]和半参数图像合成方法（SIMS）[43]。pix2pixHD是目前最先进的基于GAN的条件图像合成框架。CRN使用深度网络从低分辨率到高分辨率反复细化输出，而SIMS采用半参数方法，从训练集中组合真实片段并细化边界。CRN和SIMS主要使用图像重建损失进行训练。为了公平比较，我们使用作者提供的实现训练CRN和pix2pixHD模型。由于使用SIMS进行图像合成需要对训练数据集进行大量查询，对于像COCO-Stuff和完整ADE20K这样的大型数据集，计算成本过高。因此，我们在可用时使用作者提供的结果。

items.en: Quantitative comparisons. As shown in Table 1, our method outperforms the current state-of-the-art methods by a large margin in all the datasets. For the COCO-Stuff, our method achieves an mIoU score of 35.235.235.2, which is about 1.51.51.5 times better than the previous leading method. Our FID is also 2.22.22.2 times better than the previous leading method. We note that the SIMS model produces a lower FID score but has poor segmentation performances on the Cityscapes dataset. This is because the SIMS synthesizes an image by first stitching image patches from the training dataset. As using the real image patches, the resulting image distribution can better match the distribution of real images. However, because there is no guarantee that a perfect query (e.g., a person in a particular pose) exists in the dataset, it tends to copy objects that do not match the input segments.
items.zh: 定量比较。如表1所示，我们的方法在所有数据集上大幅优于当前最先进的方法。对于COCO-Stuff，我们的方法实现了35.2的mIoU分数，比之前领先方法高出约1.5倍。我们的FID也比之前领先方法好2.2倍。我们注意到，SIMS模型在Cityscapes数据集上产生了较低的FID分数，但分割性能较差。这是因为SIMS首先从训练数据集中拼接图像块来合成图像。由于使用了真实图像块，生成的图像分布能更好地匹配真实图像分布。然而，由于不能保证数据集中存在完美的查询（例如，特定姿势的人），它倾向于复制与输入片段不匹配的对象。

items.en: Qualitative results. In Figures 5 and 6, we provide qualitative comparisons of the competing methods. We find that our method produces results with much better visual quality and fewer visible artifacts, especially for diverse scenes in the COCO-Stuff and ADE20K dataset. When the training dataset size is small, the SIMS model also renders images with good visual quality. However, the depicted content often deviates from the input segmentation mask (e.g., the shape of the swimming pool in the second row of Figure 6).
items.zh: 定性结果。在图5和图6中，我们提供了竞争方法的定性比较。我们发现，我们的方法产生的结果具有更好的视觉质量和更少的可见伪影，特别是对于COCO-Stuff和ADE20K数据集中的多样场景。当训练数据集规模较小时，SIMS模型也能渲染出视觉质量良好的图像。然而，描绘的内容常常偏离输入分割掩码（例如，图6第二行中游泳池的形状）。

items.en: In Figures 7 and 8, we show more example results from the Flickr Landscape and COCO-Stuff datasets. The proposed method can generate diverse scenes with high image fidelity. More results are included in the appendix.
items.zh: 在图7和图8中，我们展示了来自Flickr Landscape和COCO-Stuff数据集的更多示例结果。所提出的方法能够生成具有高图像保真度的多样场景。更多结果包含在附录中。

items.capEn: Figure 8: Semantic image synthesis results on COCO-Stuff. Our method successfully generates realistic images in diverse scenes ranging from animals to sports activities.
items.capZh: 图8：在COCO-Stuff上的语义图像合成结果。我们的方法成功地在从动物到体育活动的多样场景中生成逼真的图像。

items.en: Human evaluation. We use the Amazon Mechanical Turk (AMT) to compare the perceived visual fidelity of our method against existing approaches. Specifically, we give the AMT workers an input segmentation mask and two synthesis outputs from different methods and ask them to choose the output image that looks more like a corresponding image of the segmentation mask. The workers are given unlimited time to make the selection. For each comparison, we randomly generate 500500500 questions for each dataset, and each question is answered by 555 different workers. For quality control, only workers with a lifetime task approval rate greater than 98%percent9898\% can participate in our study.
items.zh: 人类评估。我们使用Amazon Mechanical Turk（AMT）来比较我们的方法与现有方法的感知视觉保真度。具体来说，我们给AMT工作人员一个输入分割掩码和来自不同方法的两个合成输出，并要求他们选择看起来更像分割掩码对应图像的输出图像。工作人员有无限时间进行选择。对于每个比较，我们为每个数据集随机生成500个问题，每个问题由5名不同的工作人员回答。为了质量控制，只有终身任务批准率大于98%的工作人员才能参与我们的研究。

items.capEn: Figure 9: Our model attains multimodal synthesis capability when trained with the image encoder. During deployment, by using different random noise, our model synthesizes outputs with diverse appearances but all having the same semantic layouts depicted in the input mask. For reference, the ground truth image is shown inside the input segmentation mask.
items.capZh: 图9：我们的模型在使用图像编码器训练时获得了多模态合成能力。在部署过程中，通过使用不同的随机噪声，我们的模型合成出外观多样但都具有输入掩码中描述的相同语义布局的输出。作为参考，真实图像显示在输入分割掩码内。

items.en: Effectiveness of the SPADE. For quantifying importance of the SPADE, we introduce a strong baseline called pix2pixHD++, which combines all the techniques we find useful for enhancing the performance of pix2pixHD except the SPADE. We also train models that receive the segmentation mask input at all the intermediate layers via feature concatenation in the channel direction, which is termed as pix2pixHD++ w/ Concat. Finally, the model that combines the strong baseline with the SPADE is denoted as pix2pixHD++ w/ SPADE.
items.zh: SPADE的有效性。为了量化SPADE的重要性，我们引入了一个强基线，称为pix2pixHD++，它结合了我们发现对提升pix2pixHD性能有用的所有技术，但SPADE除外。我们还训练了通过通道方向的特征拼接在所有中间层接收分割掩码输入的模型，这被称为pix2pixHD++ w/ Concat。最后，将强基线与SPADE结合的模型记为pix2pixHD++ w/ SPADE。

items.en: As shown in Table 3, the architectures with the proposed SPADE consistently outperforms its counterparts, in both the decoder-style architecture described in Figure 4 and more traditional encoder-decoder architecture used in the pix2pixHD. We also find that concatenating segmentation masks at all intermediate layers, a reasonable alternative to the SPADE, does not achieve the same performance as SPADE. Furthermore, the decoder-style SPADE generator works better than the strong baselines even with a smaller number of parameters.
items.zh: 如表3所示，采用所提出的SPADE的架构始终优于其对应架构，无论是在图4中描述的仅解码器架构还是在pix2pixHD中使用的更传统的编码器-解码器架构中。我们还发现，在所有中间层拼接分割掩码（这是SPADE的一个合理替代方案）并不能达到与SPADE相同的性能。此外，仅解码器风格的SPADE生成器即使参数数量更少，也比强基线表现更好。

items.en: Variations of SPADE generator. Table 4 reports the performance of several variations of our generator. First, we compare two types of input to the generator where one is the random noise while the other is the downsampled segmentation map. We find that both of the variants render similar performance and conclude that the modulation by SPADE alone provides sufficient signal about the input mask. Second, we vary the type of parameter-free normalization layers before applying the modulation parameters. We observe that the SPADE works reliably across different normalization methods. Next, we vary the convolutional kernel size acting on the label map, and find that kernel size of 1x1 hurts performance, likely because it prohibits utilizing the context of the label. Lastly, we modify the capacity of the generator by changing the number of convolutional filters. We present more variations and ablations in the appendix.
items.zh: SPADE生成器的变体。表4报告了我们生成器的几种变体的性能。首先，我们比较了生成器的两种输入类型：一种是随机噪声，另一种是下采样分割图。我们发现这两种变体表现出相似的性能，并得出结论：仅通过SPADE进行的调制就提供了关于输入掩码的足够信号。其次，我们在应用调制参数之前改变了无参数归一化层的类型。我们观察到SPADE在不同归一化方法下都能可靠地工作。接下来，我们改变作用于标签图的卷积核大小，发现1x1的核大小会损害性能，可能是因为它禁止利用标签的上下文。最后，我们通过改变卷积滤波器的数量来修改生成器的容量。我们在附录中展示了更多的变体和消融实验。

items.en: Multi-modal synthesis. In Figure 9, we show the multimodal image synthesis results on the Flickr Landscape dataset. For the same input segmentation mask, we sample different noise inputs to achieve different outputs. More results are included in the appendix.
items.zh: 多模态合成。在图9中，我们展示了在Flickr Landscape数据集上的多模态图像合成结果。对于相同的输入分割掩码，我们对不同的噪声输入进行采样以获得不同的输出。更多结果包含在附录中。

items.en: Semantic manipulation and guided image synthesis. In Figure 1, we show an application where a user draws different segmentation masks, and our model renders the corresponding landscape images. Moreover, our model allows users to choose an external style image to control the global appearances of the output image. We achieve it by replacing the input noise with the embedding vector of the style image computed by the image encoder.
items.zh: 语义操作和引导图像合成。在图1中，我们展示了一个应用，用户绘制不同的分割掩码，我们的模型渲染出相应的风景图像。此外，我们的模型允许用户选择外部风格图像来控制输出图像的全局外观。我们通过将输入噪声替换为由图像编码器计算的风格图像的嵌入向量来实现这一点。

items.en: We have proposed the spatially-adaptive normalization, which utilizes the input semantic layout while performing the affine transformation in the normalization layers. The proposed normalization leads to the first semantic image synthesis model that can produce photorealistic outputs for diverse scenes including indoor, outdoor, landscape, and street scenes. We further demonstrate its application for multi-modal synthesis and guided image synthesis.
items.zh: 我们提出了空间自适应归一化，它在归一化层中执行仿射变换时利用了输入语义布局。所提出的归一化导致了第一个语义图像合成模型，该模型能够为包括室内、室外、风景和街景在内的多种场景生成逼真的输出。我们进一步展示了其在多模态合成和引导图像合成中的应用。

items.en: Acknowledgments. We thank Alexei A. Efros, Bryan Catanzaro, Andrew Tao, and Jan Kautz for insightful advice. We thank Chris Hebert, Gavriil Klimov, and Brad Nemire for their help in constructing the demo apps. Taesung Park contributed to the work during his internship at NVIDIA. His Ph.D. is supported by a Samsung Scholarship.
items.zh: 致谢。我们感谢Alexei A. Efros、Bryan Catanzaro、Andrew Tao和Jan Kautz的富有洞察力的建议。我们感谢Chris Hebert、Gavriil Klimov和Brad Nemire在构建演示应用程序方面的帮助。Taesung Park在NVIDIA实习期间为这项工作做出了贡献。他的博士学位由三星奖学金资助。
